name: Tasklane
based_on: A realistic, evergreen example modeled on a common real-world need — a small product team's task tracker in the vein of Trello / Linear / Height.
summary: An AI-made multi-view app prototype: a kanban board with draggable cards, a sortable list view, and a task detail drawer with subtasks, comments, filters, and search — all client-side and persisted to localStorage.
sections: Kanban board with draggable cards across workflow lanes
List view — sortable, grouped by status, mobile-friendly
Task detail drawer with inline edit, subtasks, and comments
Toolbar with full-text search and person/priority/label filters
Header with live sprint stats and a cycle-progress ring
Seeded sample data with a reset button
localStorage persistence and a light/dark theme
setup_questions: What does the app track and who's it for?
Who's on the team (names + roles) and what labels do you use?
What sample tasks should it seed?
